'''Muzzer''' was a [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] in the [[Central Committee of Grand Moffs]]. He was one of the Moffs who supported [[Trioculus]] in his rise as new [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]].<ref name="The Glove of Darth Vader" />

==History==
{{Quote|Space is vast, and the Glove very small. Perhaps you expect too much of the Empire's Probe Droids.|Muzzer to [[Bertroff Hissa|Hissa]] in the Central Committee of Grand Moffs|<ref name="The Glove of Darth Vader" />}}
Muzzer, along with Moffs [[Dunhausen]], [[Thistleborn]] and a [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] from [[Gargon/Legends|Gargon]], were called into meeting by Trioculus who wanted to discuss finding the [[Glove of Darth Vader]]. Some time after this, Muzzer was shot in the leg by [[Tibor]], the personal [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] of [[Zorba Desilijic Tiure]], when the ''[[Moffship]]'' pulled the ''[[Zorba Express]]'' into itself, but he still survived.

{{Char-stub}}
